name: @xiigen/data-warehouse-analytics
description: FLOW-13 data-warehouse-analytics - tenant-scoped warehouse analytics, query gates, exports, retention, lineage, and cross-flow correlation lifecycle (T169-T188). Portability artifact declaring analytics co-install dependencies.

emitsEventsConsumedBy: Tenant analytics dashboards and export consumers
FLOW-14 ETL and data integration downstream warehouse provisioning consumers
readsFromOtherFlows: FLOW-11 (legal-hold and schema-governance reads before retention purge)
FLOW-09 (tenant-scoped transactional event facts for cross-flow correlation)
FLOW-10 (tenant-scoped review and reputation facts for cross-flow correlation)

coInstallNotes: FLOW-13 declares FLOW-11, FLOW-09, and FLOW-10 as co-install metadata because warehouse analytics reads their tenant-scoped records for legal-hold, transactional, and reputation correlation use cases. Their source is not bundled or double-installed inside the FLOW-13 package; tenant forks must satisfy these dependencies through package metadata and the marketplace cascade.
